title: Basic JavaScript Observer Pattern
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Observer Pattern. Focus on implementing Observer pattern structure correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Observer Pattern
description: Create a function that uses Observer pattern structure and EventEmitter implementation together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Observer Pattern Project
description: Build a small application that applies Observer pattern structure, EventEmitter implementation, Custom events with DOM in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Observer Pattern
description: The following code has bugs related to Observer pattern structure. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Observer Pattern
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Observer pattern structure and EventEmitter implementation.
